CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Continued To Dec-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Interlocutory Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-11-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Attorney Brian S. Healy of Cornerstone Law Group (415-357-2093), counsel for plaintiff/moving party
Attorney Cory Alexander Birnberg of Birnberg & Associates (415-398-1040), counsel for defendant/opposing party

Court hears arguments from both sides. Court rules now as follows: PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY REINVESTMENT FUND INC's Motion For Interlocutory Judgment is GRANTED. Execution is stayed until September 3, 2014. If escrow closes and terms of stipulation are met there will be no need to execute judgment, otherwise judgement shall be executed. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
